name: advanced-face-swap
description: Face swap one or two people into a target image

detailer.description: (Beta) Apply detailer to the image. Detailer will improve certain image details, but slightly increase generation time.
detailer.title: Detailer

hair_source.description: Choose whose hairstyle to preserve: 'user' preserves hairstyle from face image, 'target' preserves from target image
hair_source.title: hair_source

swap_image.description: The face image to swap from
swap_image.title: Swap Image

swap_image_b.description: Optional second face image to swap from
swap_image_b.title: Swap Image B

upscale.description: Apply 2x upscale and boost quality. Upscaling will refine the image and make the subjects brighter. Default value: true
upscale.title: Upscale

user_b_gender.description: Optional description of second user's gender for multi-user swaps
user_b_gender.title: user_b_gender

user_gender.description: Optional description of user gender ('a man', 'a woman'), used for multi-user swaps
user_gender.title: user_gender
